description: Quest index for A Famosa: Streets of Golden Melaka

merchants-seal.name: The Merchant's Seal
merchants-seal.description: Help Fernão Gomes recover his trading seal from Chen Wei while the customs office and harbor politics quietly reshape the matter.

customs-ledger.name: The Customs Ledger
customs-ledger.description: Trace a doctored customs ledger through the market, fortress gate, waterfront, and kampung edge to uncover how duty and cargo are being bent.

padres-dilemma.name: The Padre's Dilemma
padres-dilemma.description: Help Padre Tomás decide whether to shelter a Malay woman accused of theft.

pirates-rumor.name: Pirates on the Horizon
pirates-rumor.description: Investigate pirate sightings in the straits and decide whether the rumor is a real threat, a customs misdirection, or the first clue to a larger harbor conspiracy.

rashids-cargo.name: Rashid's Cargo
rashids-cargo.description: Help Rashid move a sealed bundle through the waterfront - and decide whether Melaka's customs, medicine, or greed are the real cargo.
